label: Gaza GDP Contraction (2023–2025)
change: -86% vs 2022 baseline; 81% of all structures damaged

label: Gaza Reconstruction Cost (Estimate)
change: Decades of sustained support needed; 97% of schools damaged/destroyed
source: UN OCHA / World Bank / UNCTAD; Board of Peace / Carnegie Endowment (Mar 2026)

label: Israel Defense Budget (2025)
change: +NIS 31B emergency supplement after Iran conflict; war costs $55.6B (2023–2025)
source: Israeli Ministry of Finance / Knesset / Bank of Israel

label: US Military Aid to Israel (FY2024)
change: +$14.1B emergency supplemental (Apr 2024); aid relationship under review in 2026
source: US State Department / Congressional Research Service

label: Gaza Unemployment Rate
change: Up from 47% pre-war (2022); food avg 2 meals/day (up from 1 in Jul 2025)
source: ILO / Palestinian Central Bureau of Statistics / UN OCHA Mar 2026

label: West Bank GDP Contraction (2023–2025)
change: Israel withholds $2.5B Palestinian clearance revenue; 36,000+ forcibly displaced
source: World Bank / Palestinian MoF / UN OHCHR (Mar 2026)

label: 2026 Gaza/West Bank Flash Appeal
change: Covers 3.6M people across Gaza and West Bank; covers food, water, shelter, health

label: Israeli Tourism Revenue Loss (2024)
change: -75% vs 2019 peak; slow recovery projected as ceasefire holds
source: Israeli Tourism Ministry / World Tourism Organization

label: West Bank Settlement Economic Output
change: Exceeds entire Palestinian GDP by 3x; 64,000+ new units approved in 12 months
source: UN OCHA / B'Tselem / UN OHCHR Mar 2026

label: Palestinian Territory Aid Dependency
change: Gaza 100% aid-dependent; only ~200 trucks/day entering vs 600 needed
source: World Bank / OECD DAC / WHO Mar 2026

label: Israel Credit Rating (Moody's / S&P)
change: S&P upgraded outlook to 'stable' post-ceasefire; Moody's holds Baa1 negative outlook

label: US Reconstruction Commitment (Board of Peace)
change: Announced by Trump at Feb 18, 2026 inaugural Board of Peace meeting in Washington
